qa_matrix.question_text: Kindly confirm your full Name
Your Date of birth
Education Qualiﬁcation
Your current Occupation
Please show your ID proof
Kindly share your current location( City and state with country)?
Sir/Mam' are you in agreement with the declaration that I have read out to you.
qa_matrix.captured_response: You ever declared and agree that the particular answers to the above questions are complete and fair and this response will form a part of the policy records. Thank you for your information and cooperation, ma'am. - Okay.
qa_matrix.suggested_correction: The doctor should explicitly ask if the customer is in agreement with the declaration after reading it out.

qa_matrix.question_text: In the last 24 months, have you smoked or used any tobacco or nicotine products?
Do you consume alcohol ?
Have you ever been advised by a doctor to reduce or stop alcohol consumption ?
Have you ever used recreational drugs or Narcotics that was not prescribed by a Licensed physician ?
What is Proposed insured height (cm)?
qa_matrix.suggested_correction: The customer stated 5.5 (presumably feet), which converts to approximately 167.64 cm. This differs from the MER value of 165.1 cm. The doctor should have clarified the unit or re-measured/confirmed the height.

qa_matrix.question_text: What is Proposed Insured weight (kg)?
High/Low blood pressure, raised cholesterol or triglycerides or lipids

Chest pain or heaviness or discomfort, heart murmur, heart attack, coronary artery disease, Heart valve disorder, congenital heart disease, palpitation, rheumatic fever, shortness of breath or any other heart conditions
qa_matrix.suggested_correction: The doctor omitted some conditions like 'Heart valve disorder, congenital heart disease, palpitation'.

qa_matrix.question_text: Cancer or carcinoma-in-situ, pre-cancerous condition, leukaemia, enlarged nodes, unusual skin lesions, dysplasia, leukoplakia, sacroma, tumours, polyps, nodules, cysts, lump or other growths
qa_matrix.suggested_correction: The doctor omitted some conditions like 'unusual skin lesions, nodules, cysts, lump'.

qa_matrix.question_text: Diabetes, raised blood sugar or sugar in urine,Hyperthyroidism, Hypothyroidism , other thyroid disorders, or any other endocrine disorders
Asthma, bronchitis, sinusitis, tuberculosis, pneumonia, chronic or recurrent cough, sleep apnea, emphysema, chronic pulmonary disease (COPD) or any other respiratory disorders
qa_matrix.suggested_correction: The doctor omitted some conditions like 'chronic or recurrent cough, emphysema'.

qa_matrix.question_text: Hepatitis, hepatitis carrier, fatty liver, liver cirrhosis, jaundice, alcoholic liver disease or any other diseases or disorders of the liver
Anemia, thalassemia, systemic lupus erythematosus or any other diseases or disorders of the blood or autoimmune disease

Anxiety, depression, epilepsy, paralysis, weakness of limb, stroke, transient ischemic attack (TIA), multiple sclerosis, Parkinson's disease, Dementia, Alzheimer's or any other neurological, nervous, mental health disorders?
qa_matrix.suggested_correction: The doctor missed asking about neurological, nervous, or mental health disorders.

qa_matrix.question_text: Gastritis, gastroesophageal reflux disease (GERD), stomach ulcer, recurrent indigestion, irritable bowel syndrome, Barrett's esophagus, atrophic gastritis, Crohn's disease, ulcera-tive colitis, Pancreatitis/Pancreatic disorder or any gastrointestinal diseases or disorders
qa_matrix.suggested_correction: The doctor omitted some conditions like 'recurrent indigestion, atrophic gastritis, Crohn's disease'.

qa_matrix.question_text: Kidney stones, gall stones, kidney or urinary tract infection, blood or protein in urine, chronic kidney disease, kidney failure, piles, fistula, hydrocele or any other disorders of the kidney, bladder, genital, prostate or urinary systems?
qa_matrix.suggested_correction: The doctor omitted 'bladder' from the list of disorders.

qa_matrix.question_text: Recurrent Back pain, arthritis, gout, slipped disc, muscular dystrophies, deformity, physical disability or any other disorders of muscle, bones, joints, limbs or spine?
qa_matrix.suggested_correction: The doctor omitted 'deformity, physical disability or any other disorders of ... spine'.

qa_matrix.question_text: Blindness,cataracts, glaucoma, impaired sight, double vision or any other diseases or disorders of eyes
Deafness, Impaired hearing, speech problem, hoarseness of voice, difficult in swal-lowing, ear discharge or any other diseases or disorders of ears, nose or throat
qa_matrix.suggested_correction: The doctor omitted 'difficult in swallowing, ear discharge'.

qa_matrix.question_text: Is there anything else that you would like to share with us with respect to your health/ habits or anything else that you believe is important to ensure that policy is processed basis all facts & information?

Other than what you have already told us, have you had a medical condition that has required any of the following within the last 5 years a)Any abnormal medical findings or pending test results, scheduled or planned or pre-scribed medical tests such as imaging scan reports (e.g. x-ray, ultrasound, MRI, PET scan, CT scan etc.), biopsy, electrocardiogram (ECG), treadmill, Mammography, Endo-scopy/Colonoscopy, PAP Smear, blood or urine test
qa_matrix.suggested_correction: The doctor omitted many specific examples of medical tests.

typo_in_expected_response.corrected_text: prescribed medical tests such as imaging scan reports (e.g. x-ray, ultrasound, MRI, PET scan, CT scan etc.), biopsy, electrocardiogram (ECG), treadmill, Mammography, Endoscopy/Colonoscopy, PAP Smear, blood or urine test

qa_matrix.question_text: b) Medication or treatment that lasted more than 2 weeks or had been referred to a specialist doctor or hospital for any treatment/consultation and/or investigations (eg: Blood, ECG, MRI, Xray etc)
c) Inability to perform your daily activities or absent from work more than two 2 consec-utive weeks at a time
Have you suffered from any congenital defect or disorder or hereditary disease such as cerebral palsy, Down's syndrome, poliomyelitis
Have you or your spouse or partner been told to undergo tests or treatment, or received any medical advice or counselling in connection with sexually transmitted diseases, including HIV and AIDS?

Apart from what you have disclosed, are you experiencing any unexplained weight loss/gain or any sign/symptoms that you are likely to seek medical advice or treatment for or awaiting any surgical procedure.
Are you Pregnant now?
Have you ever suffered/are currently suffering from gestational diabetes, preeclampsia or any other pregnancy related complications?

Have you ever suffered from or consulted a doctor for breast lump(s), breast disease, irregular or painful menstruation, abnormal Pap Smear or any other breasts or gyneco-logical conditions such as vaginal disorders, or disorder of the uterus, ovary, fallopian tubes ?
qa_matrix.suggested_correction: The doctor omitted 'abnormal Pap Smear' and phrased 'breast lump(s)' as 'breast lump disease'.

critical_issues: One mandatory medical history question (Neurological/Mental Health disorders) was completely missed by the doctor.
There is a discrepancy in the customer's height between the stated value (5.5 feet, approx. 167.64 cm) and the MER (165.1 cm).
recommendations: The doctor must ensure all questions from the MER document are asked to the customer.
The doctor should clarify units and confirm measurements like height, especially when there's a potential discrepancy or ambiguity in the customer's response.
The doctor should strive to ask questions verbatim or as close as possible to the MER text to ensure all specific conditions are covered.
The doctor should explicitly ask for agreement after reading out the declaration, as per the MER format.
The doctor did not ask for language preference at the start of the call.

customer_satisfaction_indicators: Customer was cooperative throughout the call.
Customer responded to all questions asked.

validation_errors: Height discrepancy: Customer stated 5.5 (feet), which is ~167.64 cm, but MER records 165.1 cm. Difference is >1cm tolerance.

meta.insurance_company: Tata AIA Life Insurance Company Ltd.

video_analysis.attire_explanation: The doctor is wearing a white clinical apron/coat, and a stethoscope is visible around her neck.
video_analysis.visibility_explanation: Both the doctor and the customer are clearly visible in all provided frames.
video_analysis.privacy_explanation: The doctor's background is blurred and does not show any identifiable private information, other people, or confidential data.
